ui.welcome1: For patients and carers receiving systemic cancer therapy at
ui.welcome2: St George Hospital Cancer Care Centre.
ui.emergencyShort: Call 000 or go to the nearest emergency department now for chest pain, trouble breathing, sudden weakness, severe pain, or if you cannot get out of bed or walk.
ui.treatmentTitle: Are you receiving any of these treatments?
ui.treatmentLead: Select all that apply. You do not need to know the treatment name.
ui.redTitle: Emergency — call 000 or go to the nearest emergency department now.
ui.orangeTitle: Call the symptoms help line today.
ui.redAdvice: Because of one or more answers, urgent help is needed now. Tell emergency staff you are receiving cancer treatment.
ui.orangeAdvice: Please call the symptoms help line today: 9113 3909 (Option 1). Call as early in the day as you can. If emergency signs start, call 000 or go to ED.
ui.greenAdvice: Use your treatment plan and trusted information. If symptoms continue, change, or worry you, call the symptoms help line.
ui.unsureAdvice: If you are not sure, please call the symptoms help line: 9113 3909 (Option 1). If emergency signs start, call 000 or go to ED.
ui.noStore: This tool does not store your answers and does not diagnose you.
ui.translationNote: Draft translations and clinical wording should be checked by local clinicians and accredited interpreters before patient use.
ui.pageEnglishOnly: This page is currently available in English only.
ui.sectionEnglishOnly: This section is currently available in English only.
ui.helpLineHours:
Monday-Friday, 8:00 am-4:00 pm
Closed on public holidays.
ui.callEarlyText: This may help manage symptoms at home.
ui.notEverythingEmergency:
Emergency?
Chest pain, trouble breathing, severe bleeding, severe pain, sudden collapse, seizure, or sudden confusion — call 000 immediately.
ui.fewerQuestions: Only a few questions. We use them to decide whether you should call the symptoms help line or get urgent help.
ui.interpreterSectionText: If English is not your preferred language, call 131 450 and ask for an interpreter to help you contact St George Cancer Care.
ui.interpreterFamilyText: You can also ask a family member or friend to help you make the call.
ui.welcome4: Please call us early — even if you are not sure.
ui.welcomePrompt: Feeling unwell or worried about a symptom during cancer treatment?
ui.welcomeSupport: This website can help you decide what to do next.
ui.footerGeneral: General information only. Not a substitute for medical advice.
ui.emergencyContactText: Call 000 immediately if this is an emergency.
ui.emergencySymptoms: Chest pain, trouble breathing, severe bleeding, severe pain, sudden collapse, seizure, or sudden confusion.
ui.callAdviceIntro: Based on your answers, please call the Symptoms Helpline below for advice:
ui.callAdviceEscalation: If emergency signs start, call 000 or go to the Emergency Department.

concerns.label: I have a fever or feel hot
I have stomach or bowel problems
I have skin changes or a rash
I have questions about my treatment

questions.text: Do you have fever or chills?
Are you having trouble breathing?
Do you have chest pain?
Do you have sudden weakness?
Are you too weak to get out of bed or walk?

fever.title: I have a fever or feel hot

questions.text: Is your temperature 38°C or higher?
Do you have shaking chills?
Do you feel very unwell?
Are you receiving chemotherapy or do you have a low white cell count?
Are you vomiting?
Can you keep fluids down?
Have you had very little to drink today?
Are you too weak to get out of bed or walk?
Have you had diarrhoea 4 or more times today?
Is there blood in your stool?
Do you have fever or chills?
Are you dizzy or unable to drink?
Have you not opened your bowels for 3 days or more?
Do you have stomach pain or bloating?
Are you vomiting?
Are you unable to pass wind?
Have you vomited more than once today?
Can you keep fluids down?
Is there blood in your vomit?
Are you dizzy or very weak?
Is the stomach pain severe?
Is your stomach swollen or hard?
Are you vomiting?
Do you have fever or chills?
Have you not eaten for more than 24 hours?
Have you had very little to drink today?
Are you losing weight quickly or feeling very weak?

stomach-unsure.title: Stomach or bowel problem — I am not sure

questions.text: Are you unsure what is happening?
Are you short of breath at rest?
Do you have chest pain?
Are your lips or face blue?
Are you coughing blood?
Is this sudden or severe?
Is the pain severe?
Is the pain in your chest?
Do you have sudden weakness, numbness, or trouble walking?
Is your pain not helped by your usual pain medicine?

skin.title: I have skin changes or a rash

questions.text: Is the rash spreading quickly?
Do you have blisters or peeling skin?
Do you have swelling of the face, lips, or throat?
Do you have fever with the rash?
Are you unable to eat or drink because of mouth pain?
Do you have mouth ulcers?
Is there bleeding?
Do you have fever?
Are you unable to swallow?

treatment-questions.title: I have questions about my treatment

questions.text: I missed a dose of my tablets.
I vomited after taking my tablets.
I am not sure if I should take my tablets today.
I have side effects and do not know what to do.
I need appointment information.
